name: io.github.LuuOW/meridian-mcp
description: Orbital task router. Generates candidates with an LLM and ranks them via a deterministic orbital classifier (planet/moon/trojan/asteroid/comet/irregular). Domain-agnostic — candidates can be tools, prompts, documents, products.

environmentVariables.name: MERIDIAN_GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub PAT with `Models: read` permission. Required for inference.

environmentVariables.name: MERIDIAN_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Abort the fetch after this many ms.
